_note: ZABAL Gamez July Build Days - the daily build-and-stream series (see ZAOOS research doc 901). One entry per day. Each day spotlights a project and the room builds ON TOP OF it, live. Fields: date (YYYY-MM-DD), time (freeform EST string), project (the thing we build on top of), project_url (its site/repo/spec), guest (who spotlights it), handle (their Farcaster @), build_on (one line: the public surface to build on), luma_url (RSVP, optional), recording (a /recordings/N path, added after the session). status auto-derives on the page: a past date reads as 'done', today as 'live', future as 'upcoming'. The format: 0-10min the guest shows the project + the room votes what to build, 10-55min build live, 55-60min demo + handoff. Stream is always zabalgamez.com/live. Seed entries below are examples drawn from the June roster - adjust dates/guests as the July calendar locks. Add a day by appending to days[].
slot: Daily, time varies by guest (EST). Watch live at zabalgamez.com/live.

days.build_on: Build a branded mini app on the free public endpoints - leaderboards, boosters, rewards.
Build on the open bounty contract - a new front end, a submitters board, or a clip-bounty flow.
Build a real mini app from a plain prompt - no code, ships with a wallet and a token.
Build on the shared-memory knowledge graph - query the ZABAL Bonfire bot, add to the graph.
Build on Respect - a tool that reads weekly contributions and peer-consensus scores.
